sentences.arabic: كَتَبَ نَجِيبُ مَحْفُوظٍ رِوَايَاتٍ كَثِيرَةً تَصِفُ الْحَيَاةَ فِي أَحْيَاءِ الْقَاهِرَةِ الشَّعْبِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Naguib Mahfouz je napisao mnoge romane koji opisuju život u narodnim četvrtima Kaira.
sentences.translationEn: Naguib Mahfouz wrote many novels describing life in the popular neighbourhoods of Cairo.
